GuestInfo.title: GuestInfo
GuestInfo.description: Entity to store general information for guests at Pousada Solar das Gerais.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GuestInfo entity.

welcomeMessage.description: Welcome message displayed to the guest.

doorAccessCode.description: Access code for the main door.

cityTourSchedule.description: Schedule and instructions for booking a city tour.

receptionWhatsappNumber.description: WhatsApp number for contacting the reception.

MinibarMenu.title: MinibarMenu
MinibarMenu.description: Entity to store the minibar menu with items and prices.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MinibarMenu entity.

items.description: List of items available in the minibar.

ServiceItem.title: ServiceItem
ServiceItem.description: Represents a single useful service with its details.

name.description: The name of the service or establishment.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the service.

ServiceCategory.title: ServiceCategory
ServiceCategory.description: Represents a category of useful services.

category.description: The name of the service category (e.g., 'Farmácias').

order.description: A number to determine the display order of the categories.

items.description: A list of services within this category.

definition.description: Stores general information for guests. Includes fields for welcome message, breakfast details, WiFi information, door access code, city tour schedule, reception contact, and a reference to the MinibarMenu.  The document ID '{guestInfoId}' serves as a unique identifier.

params.name: guestInfoId
params.description: Unique identifier for the GuestInfo document.

definition.description: Stores minibar menu information, including items and prices.  The document ID '{minibarMenuId}' serves as a unique identifier.

params.name: minibarMenuId
params.description: Unique identifier for the MinibarMenu document.

definition.description: Stores categories of useful services for guests. Each document represents a category like 'Farmácias' or 'Saúde' and contains a list of specific services.

params.name: serviceCategoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ServiceCategory document.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to securely store and manage general information for guests, including minibar menus and useful services. The structure prioritizes authorization independence, clarity, and scalability. All user-generated content and configuration is stored in separate collections (`guest_info`, `minibar_menus`, `service_categories`) to ensure a homogeneous security posture and optimize queries. This structure allows for straightforward security rules based on document existence or field values, avoiding complex hierarchical lookups (`get()` calls). Guest information is accessible via a unique identifier, minibar menus are linked via a `minibarMenuId`, and service categories are stored in their own collection for easy retrieval and management.
